results.title: Council postpones eminent domain resolution targeting Puna land
results.description: The Hawaii County Council on Wednesday agreed to postpone a resolution calling for the acquisition of 3.74 acres of coastal Puna land using eminent domain to widen Government Beach Road — a measure described by opposition testifiers as “criminal” and an attempt to “trample” on the landowner’s rights. The post Council postpones eminent domain resolution targeting Puna land appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Proposal Seeks $100,000 Cap on Social Security Benefits for Couples
results.description: Over a million retired couples receive more than $100,000 in Social Security benefits each year. Capping benefits would help, in part, to extend Social Security's funding cliff.

results.title: Trump administration to pay $765 million to scrap four more offshore wind leases
results.description: WASHINGTON — The Interior Department said Wednesday that it would pay the energy developer Invenergy hundreds of millions of dollars to abandon plans to build wind farms in the Atlantic and Pacific, in the third such deal struck by the Trump administration to cancel offshore wind leases. The post Trump administration to pay $765 million to scrap four more offshore wind leases appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Warsh kicks off Fed chief tenure with sweeping review as rates remain unchanged
results.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh opened a new era on Wednesday, with officials agreeing to leave interest rates unchanged despite inflation stuck well above their target but also launching an ambitious reform agenda to reshape how the U.S. central bank conducts and communicates monetary policy. Warsh, who took over as Fed chief last month, made an immediate imprint in organizing a unanimous consensus around a stripped-down policy statement that jettisoned any forward guidance on what actions the central bank might take in the near term, although new quarterly projections, eschewed by Warsh himself, showed nine of 19 policymakers now anticipate a rate hike by the end of 2026. Indeed, the shortened document issued by the central bank’s Federal Open Market Committee heralded a return to a format similar to that used by former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan and clearly reflected Warsh’s disdain for expansive communication about what’s to come. The post Warsh kicks off Fed chief tenure with sweeping review as rates remain unchanged appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Namo Bharat rail to be extended from Meerut, Delhi to Rishikesh travel time reduced by 3 hours
results.description: Namo Bharat, India's semi-high-speed regional rail service, will go further upto Rishikesh in Uttarakhand from Uttar Pradesh's Meerut. The 82-km-long corridor, which will now be extended by another 150 km to Lakshman Jhula in Rishikesh.

results.title: China defends critical minerals export controls, calls for end to ‘small cliques’ after G-7 statement
results.description: It comes after G-7 leaders agreed to step up coordination to cut their countries’ reliance on China.

results.title: Column: Forget LNG, isle residents require energy affordability now
results.description: The growing debate on Oahu about our energy future has become distracted by arguments over saving a few pennies on liquefied natural gas (LNG) seven or eight years from now, while ignoring the most pertinent issue: energy affordability right now.
